overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in wizard robes walking through gothic castle corridors, encountering a poltergeist, and entering a grand dining hall with floating candles and magical ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved gothic corridor with magic portraits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the curved corridor lined with framed portraits on stone walls

entered.detail: framed portraits of historical figures hanging on stone walls
ornate carved stone balustrades lining the corridor sides
pointed stone arches forming the corridor ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, curved gothic corridor with stone walls lined with magical portraits and ornate railings. The lighting is warm and artificial from wall sconces, with a few distant students visible walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with statues and large doors

events.description: descends short staircase into larger entrance hall with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs and through the grand hall toward large wooden doors at the far end

entered.detail: tall stone sculptures on pedestals flanking the walkway
massive carved wooden double doors at the end of the hall
elaborate gothic arches spanning the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand entrance hall with high gothic arches and stone statues. The character descends stairs and walks across the marble floor toward large wooden doors, leaving the portrait-lined corridor behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: vestibule with house banners and suits of armor

events.description: poltergeist Peeves crashes on broomstick, falls to the ground, and drops his broom

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to watch the poltergeist crash while moving toward the Great Hall entrance

notable_agents.action: Peeves the poltergeist flying erratically on a broomstick before crashing and falling to the ground

entered.detail: large hanging banners with house crests on the stone walls
full plate armor standing on display pedestals
ornate red carpet runner covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vestibule decorated with house banners and suits of armor. The poltergeist Peeves flies erratically on a broomstick before crashing dramatically in the center of the room, then the character continues toward the Great Hall doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and long tables

events.description: opens large wooden doors and enters the vast candlelit Great Hall
approaches the front of the hall with dramatic natural backlighting from massive stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking between long tables filled with students toward the front of the hall and the stained glass windows

entered.detail: hundreds of candles floating in mid-air illuminating the high ceiling
long wooden house tables with students seated eating meals
massive arched stained glass windows with intricate designs at the far end

segments.scene_description: The character enters the magnificent Great Hall with floating candles overhead and long dining tables filled with students. Natural light streams through enormous stained glass windows at the far end as the character walks down the central aisle between the house tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, enclosed spaces of a gothic corridor into the vast, luminous expanse of a grand dining hall. It begins by trailing a student through a narrow, curved stone hallway lined with magical portraits and warm wall sconces, before the space opens into a grand entrance hall characterized by high arches and marble floors. As the character descends the stairs and passes through a banner-decorated vestibule, the camera captures a poltergeist crashing erratically on a broomstick before moving toward a set of massive wooden doors. The scene finally expands into the magnificent Great Hall, where the artificial warmth of the corridors is replaced by natural light streaming through stained glass windows and the magical glow of floating candles overhead.
